items.name: Coding Standards & Best Practices
items.description: Baseline coding conventions applicable across all projects. The shared floor for clean, consistent code — not a framework-specific playbook.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Git Workflow Patterns
items.description: Best practices for Git version control, branching strategies, commit conventions, merge vs rebase, and conflict resolution for teams of any size.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: API Design Patterns
items.description: Conventions for designing consistent, developer-friendly REST APIs. Covers resource naming, HTTP methods, pagination, authentication and rate limiting.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Frontend Development Patterns
items.description: Modern frontend patterns for React, Next.js, and performant UIs. Component composition, state management, performance optimization and accessibility.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Deployment Patterns
items.description: Production deployment workflows and CI/CD best practices. Rolling, blue-green, and canary strategies for safe, zero-downtime releases.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: E2E Testing Patterns
items.description: Comprehensive Playwright patterns for stable, fast, and maintainable E2E test suites. Page Object Model, multi-browser config, and CI integration.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Docker Patterns
items.description: Docker and Docker Compose patterns for local dev, container security, networking, volume strategies, and multi-service orchestration.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Database Migration Patterns
items.description: Safe, reversible database schema changes for production. Zero-downtime migrations for PostgreSQL, MySQL, Prisma, Drizzle and Django.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Deep Research
items.description: Multi-source deep research using Firecrawl and Exa MCPs. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports with source attribution.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Codebase Onboarding
items.description: Analyzes an unfamiliar codebase and generates a structured onboarding guide with architecture map, key entry points, conventions, and a starter CLAUDE.md.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Code Review Automático
items.description: Playbook Devin para revisão automática de Pull Requests. Analisa qualidade, segurança, performance e aderência ao estilo do projeto.
items.author: leoporto15

items.name: Fix Failing CI
items.description: Playbook Devin que detecta falhas no CI, analisa logs de erro, propõe e implementa correções automaticamente, abrindo um PR com o fix.
items.author: leoporto15

items.name: Dependency Update
items.description: Playbook Devin para atualização automatizada de dependências. Verifica breaking changes, roda testes e abre PRs individuais por pacote.
items.author: leoporto15

items.name: Bug Fix Workflow
items.description: Playbook Devin para triagem e correção de bugs. Reproduz o problema, identifica a causa raiz, implementa o fix e garante cobertura de testes.
items.author: leoporto15

items.name: Feature from Issue
items.description: Playbook Devin que lê um issue do GitHub, planeja a implementação, desenvolve a feature com testes e abre um PR completo com descrição detalhada.
items.author: leoporto15

items.name: Code Reviewer
items.description: Expert code review specialist that proactively examines code for quality, security, and maintainability. Must be used for all code changes.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Security Reviewer
items.description: Identifies and fixes web application vulnerabilities before they reach production. Detects OWASP Top 10, hardcoded secrets, and injection flaws.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Planner
items.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features and refactoring. Proactively activated for feature implementation, architectural changes, and complex tasks.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: TDD Guide
items.description: Test-Driven Development specialist enforcing the write-tests-first methodology. Guides teams through Red-Green-Refactor with 80%+ coverage.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Refactor & Dead Code Cleaner
items.description: Identifies and safely removes unused code, duplicate implementations, and unnecessary dependencies using automated analysis tools.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Performance Optimizer
items.description: Identifies bottlenecks and optimizes application speed, memory usage, and efficiency. Profiles slow paths, reduces bundle sizes and prevents re-renders.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: TypeScript Reviewer
items.description: Specialized TypeScript code reviewer. Enforces strict typing, identifies unsafe type assertions, and ensures idiomatic TypeScript patterns.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Python Reviewer
items.description: Specialized Python code reviewer. Checks for Pythonic patterns, type hints, async correctness, and common pitfalls in Python codebases.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Session Start
items.description: Loads previous session context and detects the package manager on every new Claude Code session. Ensures continuity and correct tooling.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Desktop Notifier
items.description: Sends a desktop notification with a task summary every time Claude finishes responding. Never miss when a long task completes.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Cost Tracker
items.description: Tracks token usage and cost metrics per session. Logs cumulative costs so you always know what each Claude Code session is spending.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Quality Gate
items.description: Runs quality gate checks automatically after every file edit. Catches lint errors, type issues, and failing tests immediately after changes.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Bash Preflight Dispatcher
items.description: Consolidated Bash preflight checks: quality validations, tmux guard, push safety, and GateGuard policy enforcement before any shell command.
items.author: affaan-m

items.name: Session Evaluator
items.description: Evaluates each session for extractable patterns and learnings. Continuously improves Claude Code's understanding of your project over time.
items.author: affaan-m
